name: palm-guard
description: Palm Guard — solar ESP32-S3 node for acoustic Red Palm Weevil early-warning + human-confirmed targeted micro-dosing. Honest, proxy-validated.

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm start --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
